metadata.title: Fast Reflexes Turn a Tight Corner Into a Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how quick thinking and steady aim catch two enemies by surprise. Timing and positioning made all the difference in this intense moment.
Where’s your favorite spot to pull off a quick double kill?

Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
